response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Song lyrics (Kaen) match the provided Reference JSON phonetically. Talk segment required manual transcription. 2. JSON Usage: Reference lyrics utilized for the song performance portion; manual transcription used for the introductory MC segment. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are strictly anchored to vocal onsets. Applied truncation for rapid speech during the rap section and split subtitles to match speaker pauses in the MC segment. Priority given to vocal audio over background UI elements.

subtitles.original: ...意味が含まれていまして
subtitles.english: ...and that meaning is included,

subtitles.original: 奏の、未完成ながら進むというスタンスを
subtitles.english: I hope to show you Kanade's current stance,

subtitles.original: このライブでお見せできればなと思います
subtitles.english: of moving forward even while incomplete.

subtitles.original: はい、ちょっとまだ自分に
subtitles.english: Yes. I'm still...

subtitles.original: 完全に満足しきっていないけど
subtitles.english: not completely satisfied with myself yet,

subtitles.original: 止まらず、今に安堵せず進んでいくぞっていう
subtitles.english: but I'll keep going without stopping or complacency.

subtitles.original: 「IN PROGRESS」っていうタイトルにしました！
subtitles.english: That's why I chose the title "IN PROGRESS"!

subtitles.original: はぁー、ま、ちょっと駆け足で紹介しましたが
subtitles.english: Phew... well, I've introduced it a bit hurriedly,

subtitles.original: 奏、ちょっとお水飲んでいきたいので
subtitles.english: but I'd like to go and get some water,

subtitles.original: ダンサーさんたち、場を繋いでもらえますか？
subtitles.english: so Dancers, could you keep the stage going for a bit?

subtitles.original: 無理ー
subtitles.english: Impossible!

subtitles.original: 無理じゃない！やるんだよ！
subtitles.english: It's not impossible! You have to do it!

subtitles.original: はい、お願いします！
subtitles.english: Yes, please!

subtitles.original: 面白い動きとかいっぱいお願いします！
subtitles.english: Please do lots of interesting movements!

subtitles.original: 何の動きですか？
subtitles.english: What kind of movement is that?

subtitles.original: 内緒ー！
subtitles.english: It's a secret!

subtitles.original: パワハラ奏みたいになっちゃいましたが
subtitles.english: It ended up looking like Power Harassment Kanade,

subtitles.original: 普段、奏のダンスの指導をしている
subtitles.english: but they are actually my dance instructors

subtitles.original: とっても親しい先生たちですよ、ね？
subtitles.english: who guide me. We're very close, right?

subtitles.original: はい！
subtitles.english: Yes!

subtitles.original: 言わせたみたいな...
subtitles.english: It sounds like I forced you...

subtitles.original: 今日の意気込み、なんか
subtitles.english: Could you tell us your enthusiasm for today,

subtitles.original: 「うおー！」とかで言ってもらえますか？
subtitles.english: maybe with a "Woooo!" or something?

subtitles.original: 頑張りまーす！
subtitles.english: We'll do our best!

subtitles.original: イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Yay!

subtitles.original: ダンサーさんたちもありがとうございます。
subtitles.english: Thank you so much, Dancers.

subtitles.original: ではではでは、
subtitles.english: Now, now, now...

subtitles.original: 次はゲストパートになります。
subtitles.english: it's time for the guest part.

subtitles.original: 最初はいったい誰かな？
subtitles.english: I wonder who's first?

subtitles.original: 楽しみということで、じゃあ、
subtitles.english: I'm looking forward to it. So,

subtitles.original: 早速次の曲行きましょう！
subtitles.english: let's get straight to the next song!

subtitles.original: Party is over
subtitles.english: Party is over

subtitles.original: それでも踊りたかった
subtitles.english: I still wanted to dance

subtitles.original: 眠れないくらい 情熱の火はいつしか
subtitles.english: Before I knew it, the fire of passion...

subtitles.original: 眠れないくらい
subtitles.english: to the point I couldn't even sleep.

subtitles.original: いつの日かに はなから気付いている
subtitles.english: I've noticed from the start, that someday...

subtitles.original: 焔はいつか消える ねぇ
subtitles.english: The flame will eventually go out, won't it?

subtitles.original: なにも要らないはずだった なのにまだ I'm so serious
subtitles.english: I shouldn't have needed anything, yet I'm still so serious

subtitles.original: ああまだ間に合う
subtitles.english: Ah, it's still not too late

subtitles.original: ああただ Burn it up Baby
subtitles.english: Ah, just burn it up baby

subtitles.original: Sorry darling そんなに甘くないよ
subtitles.english: Sorry darling, it's not that sweet

subtitles.original: でもきっとそんなに悪くないよ
subtitles.english: But I'm sure it's not that bad

subtitles.original: Give me fire Light it up Baby
subtitles.english: Give me fire, light it up baby

subtitles.original: 燃やしちゃうぜyeah
subtitles.english: I'm gonna burn it up, yeah

subtitles.original: 燃えろよ燃えろよ 炎よ燃えろ
subtitles.english: Burn on, burn on, oh flame, burn on

subtitles.original: やぁ!千代も八千代
subtitles.english: Hey! Through the ages

subtitles.original: 変わりもせずに
subtitles.english: Without changing

subtitles.original: ひとのなり いとをかし 全部燃やせ
subtitles.english: Human form, how delightful, burn it all

subtitles.original: 出でよ舞えよ火の粉
subtitles.english: Come out and dance, sparks

subtitles.original: 焚き付けるのが仕事
subtitles.english: It's my job to kindle them

subtitles.original: ガソリンとステロイド
subtitles.english: Gasoline and steroids

subtitles.original: 燃えるさまはお見事
subtitles.english: The way it burns is magnificent

subtitles.original: 火遊びはしない
subtitles.english: I won't play with fire

subtitles.original: ぬるいまね出来ない
subtitles.english: I can't do lukewarm things

subtitles.original: しけたカルマトラウマ燃やし尽くすマグマドラマ
subtitles.english: Magma drama burning up damp karma and trauma

subtitles.original: この飽くなき渇き 青い炎みたい
subtitles.english: This insatiable thirst, like a blue flame

subtitles.original: 死は過去のひとつ隣 やがて総てひとつとなり
subtitles.english: Death is right next to the past, all becomes one

subtitles.original: Love is dying でもまだ消えてないから
subtitles.english: Love is dying, but it hasn't disappeared yet

subtitles.original: 忘れてみたい 情熱の火はいつしか
subtitles.english: I want to try to forget, the fire of passion...

subtitles.original: いつの日かに 身体は気付いている
subtitles.english: Someday, my body notices

subtitles.original: 僕らはいつか消える
subtitles.english: that we will disappear someday

subtitles.original: ゆるやかに若さを溶かして
subtitles.english: Slowly melting youth away

subtitles.original: 泣かないで Why so serious？
subtitles.english: Don't cry, why so serious?

subtitles.original: ああまだ間に合う
subtitles.english: Ah, it's still not too late

subtitles.original: ああただ Burn it up Baby
subtitles.english: Ah, just burn it up baby

subtitles.original: Sorry darling そんなに甘くないよ
subtitles.english: Sorry darling, it's not that sweet

subtitles.original: でもきっとそんなに悪くないよ
subtitles.english: But I'm sure it's not that bad

subtitles.english: Give me fire, light it up baby

subtitles.english: I'm gonna burn it up, yeah
